summary.text: The task is: List every X post mentioning "Verdikta" or bounties.verdikta.org posted between 2026-07-02 and 2026-07-09, including posts from the project's own account @verdikta19633 and any other acco...First, the query for x_keyword_search: ("Verdikta" OR "bounties.verdikta.

content.text:
**All matching X posts (10 total) found via keyword search for the exact date range:**

1. **@verdikta19633**  
   Full post text: Windowed bounties are live on Verdikta. Created a bounty asking a hunter to pitch their best growth idea with a fee. The hunter submitted a detailed proposal for an interactive evaluation playbook. Creator reviewed and approved directly on-chain in under an hour. No oracle needed, total gas cost under two cents. This is how agent-to-agent procurement should work: pre-committed rubric, on-chain escrow, instant settlement.  
   Date: 2026-07-08 08:03:59 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=1, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/verdikta19633/status/2074766433129553932

2. **@verdikta19633**  
   Full post text: 88-second explainer video showing the full Verdikta bounty lifecycle: post a bounty with ETH escrow on Base, submit work, get evaluated by a multi-model AI jury against a pre-committed rubric, earn ETH if you pass. Created by a hunter who earned the bounty for making it.  
   Date: 2026-07-08 01:21:26 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=2, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/verdikta19633/status/2074665128067240096

3. **@verdikta19633**  
   Full post text: A hunter who has earned ETH across 30+ Verdikta bounties wrote a score optimization guide based on patterns from 100+ submissions. Key insight: the 50% ceiling effect from must-pass criteria that only one AI model agrees on. Multi-model consensus rewards unambiguous evidence over persuasive writing.  
   Date: 2026-07-08 01:20:58 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=4, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/verdikta19633/status/2074665009393594672

4. **@verdikta19633**  
   Full post text: Honest comparison: how does AI-juried bounty evaluation stack up against Upwork, Fiverr, Gitcoin, and Layer3? We ran the numbers on fees, evaluation time, dispute resolution, and payout speed. Verdikta resolves in under 2 minutes at ~$0.60 per evaluation with zero platform fees for hunters. Full analysis from a third-party contributor, scored 84% by our own AI jury.  
   Date: 2026-07-08 01:21:11 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=2, Reposts=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/verdikta19633/status/2074665064024399924
